coverage.criterion: tests/run-tests.sh exists, is executable, and exits 0 on Linux CI
coverage.notes: T-0008 creates executable bash runner with set -euo pipefail and node --test tests/; T-0007 supplies passing tests required for exit 0; T-0010 verifies CI checks job executes runbook TEST_COMMAND when non-empty.

coverage.criterion: Tests cover #resolveCategory precedence (account mapping beats auto-cat beats AI mock) with at least 4 cases
coverage.notes: T-0005 adds createForTest/resolveCategoryForTest seam (DEC-0006); T-0006 provides fixture/stub factories; T-0007 implements four required cases (account-wins, auto-cat-wins, ai-wins, account-beats-ai) per architecture AC-2 matrix; T-0011 optional stretch cases 5–6.

coverage.criterion: docs/engineering/runbook.md TEST_COMMAND points to the working runner (OS-aware or dual sh/ps documented)
coverage.notes: T-0008 creates Linux runner; T-0009 updates runbook frontmatter TEST_COMMAND to bash tests/run-tests.sh and documents Windows powershell runner in body. Current runbook still references missing ps1-only command — addressed by T-0009.

coverage.criterion: npm test delegates to the test runner or documents the canonical command
coverage.notes: T-0009 replaces package.json scripts.test stub (currently exit 1) with delegation to bash tests/run-tests.sh. package.json and runbook updated together per T-0009/T-0010 risk note.

coverage.criterion: CI workflow checks job runs TEST_COMMAND when set and reports pass/fail
coverage.notes: ci.yml already reads TEST_COMMAND from runbook frontmatter and conditionally runs it (checks job step at lines 65–67); T-0009 updates runbook value; T-0010 verifies wiring without workflow edit unless bootstrap parser requires fix.

optional_tasks.rationale: AC-2 satisfied by T-0007 four required cases alone; T-0011 adds stale-mapping and invalid-AI stretch coverage per architecture optional matrix.
